resetAppDialog.title: Reset App
resetAppDialog.message: Are you sure you want to reset the app?
resetAppDialog.detail: This will clear all your accounts, settings, and data. This action cannot be undone.

restart.detail: Do you want to restart the app now?

validationFailed.message: Failed to validate Meru Pro trial
validationFailed.detailOnline: Please restart the app to try again or contact support for further help with the error: {{message}} ({{cause}}) - Hint: Could a VPN or firewall block the connection?
validationFailed.detailOffline: It seems you are currently offline. Please connect to the internet and restart the app to try again.

expired.message: Your Meru Pro trial has ended
expired.detail: Upgrade to Pro to keep using all features or continue with the free version.

testNotification.title: Tim from Meru
testNotification.subtitle: Your Test Notification Request
testNotification.body: This is a test notification to show how notifications will appear.

restartRequired.message: A restart is required for the changes to take full effect.

meruProRequired.title: Meru Pro required
meruProRequired.description: Please upgrade to Meru Pro to add more accounts.

downloadHistory.title: Recent Download History
downloadHistory.emptyDescription: Your downloaded files will appear here.
downloadHistory.emptyRetention: Downloads older than 30 days will be automatically removed from the history.

licenseBanner.upgradeAll: Upgrade to Meru Pro to unlock all options

unifiedInbox.title: Unified Inbox
unifiedInbox.noUnreadDescription: Your unified inbox will show all your unread messages in one place. Once you read a message, it will disappear from the unified inbox.

downloadHistory.title: Download History
downloadHistory.emptyDescription: Your downloaded files will appear here.
downloadHistory.emptyRetention: Downloads older than 30 days will be automatically removed from the history.

titlebar.trialEndsInLessThanDay: Pro trial ends in less than a day
titlebar.updateAvailableMessage: Meru {{version}} is available and ready to install

languages.title: Languages
languages.spellcheckerDescription: Select additional languages for spellchecking alongside the system language.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.label: Label
accounts.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {{label}}?
accounts.upgradeToAddMore: Upgrade to Meru Pro to add more accounts

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.showUnreadBadgesDescription: Hide all unread badges if disabled regardless of individual account settings.
appearance.enableDockIconDescription: Show the application icon in the dock.
appearance.showUnreadBadgeDescription: Show an unread badge on the dock icon when there are unread emails.
appearance.enableMenuBarIconDescription: Show the application icon in the menu bar.
appearance.showUnreadCountDescription: Show an unread count next to the menu bar icon when there are unread emails.
appearance.enableSystemTrayIconDescription: Show the application icon in the system tray.
appearance.colorDescription: Choose the color of the system tray icon.
appearance.selectAccountWithUnread: Select Account with Unread on Click
appearance.selectAccountWithUnreadDescriptionMenuBa: Automatically select the first account with unread emails when clicking the menu bar icon.
appearance.selectAccountWithUnreadDescriptionTray: Automatically select the first account with unread emails when clicking the system tray icon.
appearance.restrictMinimumSizeDescription: Limit the minimum size of the application window to prevent it from being too small.

license.title: License
license.enterKeyDescription: Please enter the license key you received at your email address after your purchase.
license.activeDescription: You're using Meru Pro with professional features and for commercial use. Thank you for supporting Meru!
license.trialDaysLeft_one: You're using a Meru Pro trial with {{count}} day left.
license.trialDaysLeft_other: You're using a Meru Pro trial with {{count}} days left.
license.trialPurchaseReminder: Purchase Meru Pro before your trial ends to keep using all features.
license.freeDescriptionLine1: You're using the free version of Meru for personal use.
license.freeDescriptionLine2: Unlock Meru Pro for professional features and commercial use. Your upgrade supports ongoing development.

updates.title: Updates
updates.notifyDescription: Receive notifications when updates are available.
updates.notificationDelayDescription: Batch rapid back-to-back releases into a single prompt. Urgent updates always notify immediately.

blocker.title: Blocker
blocker.enableDescription: Use blocker to improve your privacy by blocking unwanted content and network requests.

downloads.title: Downloads
downloads.saveAs: Show Save As Dialog Before Downloading
downloads.saveAsDescription: Prompt for a location each time before a file is downloaded.
downloads.openFolderWhenDoneDescription: Automatically open the folder containing the downloaded file when the download is complete.
downloads.defaultLocationDescription: This is the default location where downloaded files are saved.

gmail.title: Gmail
gmail.hideGmailLogoDescription: Hides the Gmail logo on the top left corner.
gmail.hideOutOfOfficeDescription: Hides the out of office banner at the top of the window.
gmail.composeInNewWindow: Always Compose New Emails in New Window
gmail.composeInNewWindowDescription: Opens a new window for composing emails instead of inside Gmail.
gmail.closeComposeAfterSendDescription: Automatically closes the compose window after pressing the send button.
gmail.reverseConversationDescription: Displays email conversations in reverse order, showing the latest message at the top.
gmail.moveAttachmentsToTopDescription: Moves email attachments to the top of the email.
gmail.replyForwardInPopOutDescription: Opens reply and forward in a pop-out instead of below the message.
gmail.hideInboxFooterDescription: Hides the footer at the bottom of the inbox.
gmail.showSenderIconsDescription: Show sender icons next to the senders in your inbox.
gmail.unreadCountPreferenceDescription: When using multiple inboxes, sets which sections contribute to the unread count shown on the app. Default combines all sections.
gmail.categoriesToMonitorDescription: If using an inbox with categories, choose which inbox categories are monitored for new email notifications and included in the unified inbox.
gmail.userStylesDescription: Add your own custom CSS to further personalize the Gmail interface. A restart is required after making changes.

googleApps.title: Google Apps
googleApps.openInAppDescription: Open Google Apps in app instead of external browser.
googleApps.openInNewWindowDescription: Always open Google Apps in a new window instead of reusing the same window if it is already open.
googleApps.excludedAppsDescription: Select which Google Apps should open in the external browser instead of the app.
googleApps.showAccountLabelDescription: Show the account label in the titlebar of Google Apps windows if using more than one account.
googleApps.showAccountColorDescription: Show a colored indicator on top of Google Apps windows to indicate which account is being used when an account has a color configured.
googleApps.pinnedAppsDescription: Pin Google Apps to the titlebar and drag to reorder.
googleApps.noPinnedApps: No pinned apps. Add apps from Available below.

unifiedInbox.title: Unified Inbox
unifiedInbox.enabledDescription: Show all unread messages from every account in a single unified inbox.
unifiedInbox.showSenderIconsDescription: Show sender icons next to the senders in the unified inbox.

phishingProtection.title: Phishing Protection
phishingProtection.confirmExternalLinksDescription: Prompt for confirmation before opening links from untrusted hosts in your browser.

savedSearches.title: Saved Searches
savedSearches.upgradeBanner: Upgrade to Meru Pro to add saved searches
savedSearches.label: Label
savedSearches.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{label}}?

verificationCodes.title: Verification Codes
verificationCodes.autoCopy: Automatically Copy Verification Code to Clipboard
verificationCodes.autoCopyDescription: Verification code received via email will be automatically copied to your clipboard for easy and instant pasting.
verificationCodes.detectionConfidenceDescription: Choose the confidence level for detecting verification codes. Medium may result in false positives, while High checks for explicit keywords, but may miss some codes.
verificationCodes.autoMarkAsRead: Automatically Mark Email as Read After Copying Verification Code
verificationCodes.autoMarkAsReadDescription: Email containing verification code will be automatically marked as read after the code has been copied to your clipboard.
verificationCodes.autoDelete: Automatically Delete Email After Copying Verification Code
verificationCodes.autoDeleteDescription: Email containing verification code will be automatically deleted after the code has been copied to your clipboard.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.launchAtLoginDescription: Enable this option to automatically start the application when you log into your computer.
advanced.defaultMailClientActive: Meru is set as default mail client.
advanced.defaultMailClientDescription: Set Meru as the default mail client to handle email links and related protocols.
advanced.launchMinimizedDescription: Enable this option to start the application in a minimized state.
advanced.useSystemPickerDescription: Use the system's native screen sharing picker when sharing your screen.
advanced.hardwareAccelerationDescription: Enabling hardware acceleration can improve performance but can also cause compatibility issues on some systems.
advanced.customUserAgentDescription: Some Gmail or Google app features may not work with the default user agent. Enabling this option will use a custom user agent and may help resolve issues, but can also cause others. Disable this option if you experience instability.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.showSenderDescription: Display the email sender's name in notifications.
notifications.showSubjectDescription: Display the email subject in notifications.
notifications.showSummaryDescription: Display the email summary in notifications.
notifications.notificationTimesDescription: Configure time windows when notifications are active. Outside these windows, notifications will be silenced. Leave empty to always allow notifications.
notifications.testNotificationDescription: Show a test notification to see how notifications will appear.
notifications.dndBlocksTest: Unable show test notification while Do Not Disturb is enabled.
notifications.downloadsDescription: Show a notification when a download is completed, cancelled or failed.
notifications.googleAppsDescription: Allow notifications from Google Apps like Calendar, Meet, Chat, etc.
notifications.playSoundDescription: Play a sound when showing a notification.
notifications.soundFieldDescription: Select the sound to play for notifications.
notifications.volumeDescription: Set the volume level for notification sounds.
notifications.noFreeSlot: No free time slot available to add a new window.
notifications.timesOverlap: Notification times overlap. Please adjust the time windows.
